g.text: for wi, xi in zip(self.w, x):
act = act + wi * xi # Each op creates Value

text.tspan: # 2. act._backward() -> pushes grad to s₂, b
# 3. s₂._backward() -> pushes grad to s₁, p₃
# 4. ... chain continues to w₁, w₂, w₃
# 2. act._backward() -> pushes grad to s₂, b
# 3. s₂._backward() -> pushes grad to s₁, p₃
# 4. ... chain continues to w₁, w₂, w₃
